steps.title: Find the two clauses
steps.content: The first clause says the exhibition set out to provide an overview of photography through the 1950s. The second says its efforts were largely successful. These are two independent clauses, even though the second begins with the phrase given the collection's breadth.

steps.title: Join the clauses correctly
steps.content: Choices B and D lack the comma needed before a coordinating conjunction joining independent clauses. Choice C gives a comma but no conjunction, creating an improper clause join. The option with 1950s, and uses the required comma and conjunction. The answer is A.
